sections.title: Standard dialogue after Dragon Slayer II

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi Unferth. How are you doing?

lines.speaker: Unferth
lines.text: It's just not the same without Bob around.

lines.speaker: Unferth
lines.text: Gertrude asked me if I'd like one of her new kittens. I don't think I'm ready for that yet.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Give it time. Things will get better, I promise.
